meaning: n.<苏格兰> 湖,(狭长的)海湾
examples: They went till Inverness via Loch Ness.
In 1933, a husband and wife reported that they saw a big monster in Loch Ness.
Many people travel to Loch Ness to look for this strange monster, but only a few people have seen it.
In Scotland, summer is the second most famous myth after the Loch Ness Monster.
"We finally caught the Loch Ness Monster with a camcorder, " King attorney Milton Grimes said.
